irl-redactor.editor.cookieHint: PNG/JPG from the cookies folder. White passes, black blocks.
irl-redactor.editor.autoLightWarnBody: Auto block-lights are experimental. Performance is not guaranteed, especially in densely-lit areas with shadows enabled.
irl-redactor.patcher.title: Patcher
irl-redactor.patcher.status.selectBoth: Select a shaderpack and a patch for it.
irl-redactor.patcher.status.selectPack: Select a shaderpack from the list.
irl-redactor.patcher.status.selectPatch: Select a patch for the shaderpack.
irl-redactor.patcher.emptyPacks: No shaderpacks found. Put them in the shaderpacks folder.
irl-redactor.patcher.meta.match: This patch is made for the %s shaderpack.
irl-redactor.patcher.meta.mismatch: This patch is made for a different shaderpack (%s).
irl-redactor.patcher.meta.pickPack: This patch is for the %s shaderpack. Select it in the list above.
irl-redactor.patcher.meta.pickPackNoTarg: Select a shaderpack above to continue.
irl-redactor.patcher.result.validateOk: It fits! Press "Patch" to create the light version of the pack.
irl-redactor.patcher.result.patchOk: Done! Pack "%s" created. Select it in Iris settings.
irl-redactor.patcher.result.failAlreadyP: This shaderpack already has the light. Pick the original (clean) pack.
irl-redactor.patcher.result.failNoFit: This patch didn't fit the selected pack, maybe it's a different version.
irl-redactor.patcher.result.failBadPack: Couldn't open the shaderpack. Make sure a valid pack is selected.
irl-redactor.patcher.result.failIo: File error. Close the pack in other programs and try again.
irl-redactor.patcher.result.failVersion: Patch isn't compatible with this mod version. Update the mod or the patch.
